constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hinj, hsurj⟩
    have hg : ∃ g : V → U, f ∘ g = id := by
      classical
      refine ⟨fun v => if hv : ∃ u, f u = v then Classical.choose hv else Classical.choice (by
        have : Nonempty U := by
          rcases hsurj (Classical.choice (Classical.propComplete (∃ u : U, True))) with ⟨u, hu⟩
          exact ⟨u⟩
        exact this), ?_⟩
      funext v
      classical
      by_cases hv : ∃ u, f u = v
      · have : f (Classical.choose hv) = v := Classical.choose_spec hv
        simp [Function.comp, id, hv, this]
      · simp [Function.comp, id, hv]
    rcases hg with ⟨g, hfg⟩
    refine ⟨f, g, hfg, ?_⟩
    funext u
    have : f (g (f u)) = f u := by
      simpa [Function.comp, id] using congrArg (fun h => h (f u)) hfg
    exact hinj this
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro u1 u2 h
      have : g (f u1) = g (f u2) := congrArg g h
      simpa [Function.comp, id] using this.trans (by simpa [Function.comp, id] using congrArg (fun h => h u2) hgf)
    · intro v
      refine ⟨g v, ?_⟩
      simpa [Function.comp, id] using congrArg (fun h => h v) hfg

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
    classical
    have hs : Surjective f := hf.2
    let g : V → U := fun v => Classical.choose (hs v)
    have hg : ∀ v : V, f (g v) = v := fun v => Classical.choose_spec (hs v)
    refine ⟨f, g, ?_, ?_⟩
    · funext v
      exact hg v
    · funext u
      exact hf.1 u
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_⟩
    constructor
    · intro u
      have : g (f u) = u := by
        simpa [Function.comp, id] using congrArg (fun h => h u) hgf
      exact this
    · intro v
      refine ⟨g v, ?_⟩
      have : f (g v) = v := by
        simpa [Function.comp, id] using congrArg (fun h => h v) hfg
      exact this

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    exact ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    exact ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
    classical
    refine ⟨f, invFun f, ?_, ?_⟩
    · ext y
      exact invFun_comp hf y
    · ext x
      exact leftInverse_invFun hf x
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_⟩
    refine ⟨g, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro x
      have : g (f x) = x := by
        simpa [Function.comp, id] using congrArg (fun h => h x) hgf
      exact this.symm
    · intro y
      have : f (g y) = y := by
        simpa [Function.comp, id] using congrArg (fun h => h y) hfg
      exact this.symm

constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, ⟨g, ⟨hfg, hgf⟩⟩⟩
    exact ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    exact ⟨f, ⟨g, ⟨hfg, hgf⟩⟩⟩

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
    classical
    let g : V → U := fun v => Classical.choose (hf.2 v)
    have hgf : g ∘ f = id := by
      funext u
      have : ∃ u' : U, f u' = f u := hf.2 (f u)
      have hgu : f (g (f u)) = f u := Classical.choose_spec this
      exact hf.1 hgu
    have hfg : f ∘ g = id := by
      funext v
      exact (Classical.choose_spec (hf.2 v)).2
    refine ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro u1 u2 h
      have := congrArg g h
      simpa [Function.comp, hgf] using this
    · intro v
      refine ⟨g v, ?_⟩
      have := congrArg (fun h : V → V => h v) hfg
      simpa [Function.comp, id] using this

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
    classical
    have : ∀ v : V, ∃ u : U, f u = v := by
      intro v
      rcases hf v with ⟨u, hu⟩
      exact ⟨u, hu⟩
    let g : V → U := fun v => Classical.choose (this v)
    refine ⟨f, g, ?_, ?_⟩
    · funext v
      have := Classical.choose_spec (this v)
      simpa [g, Function.comp, id] using this
    · funext u
      have : f (g (f u)) = f u := by
        have := Classical.choose_spec (this (f u))
        simpa [g] using this
      exact hf.injective this
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_⟩
    intro v
    refine ⟨g v, ?_⟩
    have : (f ∘ g) v = id v := by simpa [hfg]
    simpa [Function.comp, id] using this

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
    classical
    refine ⟨f, invFun f, ?_, ?_⟩
    · funext v
      exact invFun_eq (f := f) (by simpa [onto] using hf.2) v
    · funext u
      exact leftInverse_invFun (f := f) (by simpa [one_to_one] using hf.1) u
  · rintro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_⟩
    have h_left : g ∘ f = id := hgf
    have h_right : f ∘ g = id := hfg
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · show one_to_one f
      intro u1 u2 hu
      have : (g ∘ f) u1 = (g ∘ f) u2 := congrArg g hu
      simpa [Function.comp, h_left] using this
    · show onto f
      intro v
      refine ⟨g v, ?_⟩
      simpa [Function.comp, h_right]
